release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 68. Adds clear Today and Yesterday insulin and carbohydrate treatment-history tables in the Web UI, with local day boundaries, administration times and daily totals. Removes the duplicated insulin summary block from the Insulin / bolus section while retaining current IOB and COB in Current status. Completes a declaration and scope audit for the daily-history helper functions and fixes ESP32 Arduino compilation errors related to helper prototypes, custom treatment-row types and event-count variables. Retains the COB/IOB Total OLED screen, customer-defined local alias, corrected Auto and Manual sensor-age logic, Nightscout SAGE and IOB/COB auto-read, local buzzer controls, alarm-episode snooze reset, Wi-Fi profile handling and caregiver WhatsApp routing.
